panel_title: Locked Formula A PRFT-high versus PRFT-low DEG signature used for SigCom LINCS query
what_to_show: Counts and representative genes for PRFT-high upregulated and downregulated DEG inputs; note SigCom-recognized 140 up and 131 down entries if retained after manual interface review.
recommended_plot_type: Two-column input-signature schematic or compact lollipop/count panel
main_message: The perturbational query used a locked downstream DEG signature and did not redefine Formula A.
safe_interpretation: Input signature for supplementary computational prioritization.
overclaim_to_avoid: Do not present as a new DEG analysis, new formula, or causal PRFT driver list.

panel_title: Top SigCom LINCS reverser perturbagens of the PRFT-high signature
what_to_show: Top ranked reverser perturbagens with z-score or rank, colored by conservative mechanism class and marked as candidate/hypothesis-generating.
recommended_plot_type: Horizontal bar plot of top 10-15 reversers; muted labels for low-AML-relevance or unclear annotations
main_message: SigCom prioritized perturbagens with opposite transcriptional signatures to PRFT-high AML.
overclaim_to_avoid: Do not frame as clinical sensitivity, treatment efficacy, or mechanism proof.
comment: Avoid emphasizing ketoconazole/clonazepam or other AML-weak candidates in text.

panel_title: Mechanism classes of candidate PRFT-high reversing perturbagens
what_to_show: Counts for mechanism classes, with other / unclear displayed but not highlighted.
recommended_plot_type: Bar plot or donut-free categorical count plot; separate clear mechanism classes from other / unclear
main_message: A small subset of candidates mapped to MAPK/stress-kinase, proteasome/proteostasis, HDAC, and cell-cycle/CDK classes.
safe_interpretation: Mechanism-class prioritization requiring manual annotation and experimental validation.
overclaim_to_avoid: Do not treat name-based classes as database-verified mechanisms.
comment: Mechanism classes should be discussed before individual drugs.

what_to_show: Counts for suggested convergent support, directionally complex, and not directly comparable categories.
recommended_plot_type: Stacked or grouped bar chart with directionally complex as its own category
main_message: BeatAML provided limited convergent context and many directionally complex comparisons.
safe_interpretation: Ex vivo pharmacogenomic context; higher AUC indicates lower ex vivo sensitivity / greater relative resistance.
overclaim_to_avoid: Do not merge directionally complex rows with positive support or infer clinical sensitivity.
comment: This panel is central for overclaim control.
